title: Fix frontend docs and hash overflow on mobile
close_reason: Fixed docs mobile overflow and long hash displays across frontend

title: Decompose frontend monolith components (InscriptionModal, DeliverablesReview)
description:
Worst complexity in entire repo (codebase-memory):
- InscriptionModal (cyclo~158, cognitive~274)
- DeliverablesReview (~1221 lines, cyclo~65, cognitive~92, many useStates, mixed submissions shapes)
- Also reduce useBlocks (cyclo~63), useInscriptions, MainContent (cyclo~59)

Split into state machines/containers; move review/inscription rules out of JSX.
close_reason: Modal/review monoliths split into hooks + pure utils; tests pass

title: Unify storage implementations (keep SQLite + Postgres)
description:
Reduce near-duplicate sqlite vs pg implementations while **keeping both dialects supported**:

- sqlite_store vs pg_store (e.g. CreateProposal similarity)
- apikey_store_sqlite vs apikey_store_pg
- memory_store + interface stubs in store.go

Goals:
- One clear Store interface; shared validation/helpers to cut drift
- SQLite remains **default** for single-binary (ADR 0002)
- Postgres remains **first-class** via STARGATE_STORAGE=postgres + STARGATE_PG_DSN / DATABASE_URL — do **not** retire or delete PG support
- Optional migrate-pg-to-sqlite for operators who choose SQLite; not a mandate to drop Postgres
- Reduce storage as universal gravity well through clearer boundaries (see PACKAGE_BOUNDARIES)

Non-goals: SQLite-only product; removing pg_store / PostgresStorage.
close_reason: Shared PrepareProposalForCreate, auth seed/hash, wish ID helpers, dialect Store checks; both SQLite and Postgres retained

title: Collapse dual/triple API surfaces (REST vs MCP vs data APIs)
description:
Pick primary surface for agents/UI (MCP vs REST), implement thin adapters for the secondary. Eliminate drift between overlapping endpoints:
- /api/smart_contract/*
- /api/* and /api/data/* variants
- /bitcoin/v1/*
- MCP tools via callToolDirect and getToolSchemasLegacy

~98 routes registered; many ANY method. MCP and middleware both RegisterRoutes.
close_reason: Primary surfaces documented via /api/surfaces; legacy aliases deprecated; MCP tool→REST map; UI prefers open-contracts

title: Split smart-contract god handlers in server.go
description:
Decompose backend/middleware/smart_contract/server.go mega-handlers:
- handleProposals (cyclo~104, cognitive~401, ~lines 2824-3343)
- handleContractPSBT (cyclo~108, ~lines 492-1111)
- handleSubmissions (cognitive~237, ~lines 3473-3753)

Extract domain services; wire or remove half-built backend/middleware/smart_contract/services/* stubs so server is thin HTTP only. PublishProposalTasks is duplicated (server vs event_service, similar_to 0.98).
close_reason: Domain services wired; proposals/submissions thin HTTP; PSBT helpers extracted; PublishProposalTasks deduped

title: Codebase pain points remediation (architecture/refactor)
description:
Structural remediation from codebase-memory analysis (5k nodes / 16k edges).

Pain themes: god handlers, dual API/storage surfaces, frontend monoliths, missing ADRs.
Goal: safer change velocity and clearer domain boundaries.

Priority attack order encoded in child tasks.
close_reason: All child remediation tasks completed on chore/refactor-cleanup

title: Split PSBT builder complexity (BuildFundingPSBT / BuildRaiseFundPSBT)
description:
backend/bitcoin/psbt_builder.go:
- BuildFundingPSBT: cyclo~54, cognitive~98, ~279 lines
- BuildRaiseFundPSBT: cyclo~54, cognitive~119, ~270 lines, loop_depth 4

Extract payer selection, commitment outputs, payout scripts into testable units.
close_reason: Extracted PSBT funding helpers; BuildFundingPSBT/BuildRaiseFundPSBT use shared selection/commitment units

title: Retire legacy compatibility branches (auth, MCP schemas, dual backends)
description:
Legacy debt surfaced by codebase search:
- getToolSchemasLegacy in backend/mcp/tools.go
- VerifyLegacySignMessage vs newer auth paths in auth_handler
- PG/SQLite dual backends
- Deprecated routes / dual image paths (backend vs frontend legacy)

Inventory call sites, add deprecation windows, remove dead paths after migration verification.
close_reason: Contract-stego and inscriptions legacy retired; docs updated; Postgres kept as first-class

title: Reduce stego/ingestion/bitcoin/contract domain entanglement
description:
Domain coupling pain — changes require reading four domains at once:
- block monitor reconcile (reconcileOracleIngestions cyclo~33)
- stego publish/reconcile (publishStegoForProposal, upsertContractFromStegoPayload)
- PSBT builders with deep loops
- wish/proposal identity via pixel hashes and manifests

Define module seams and event/API contracts between domains.
close_reason: Identity package + domain ports/seams docs; clear dependency direction between bitcoin, stego, ingestion, contracts

title: Clarify package boundaries (middleware is the app layer)
description:
Graph boundaries: middleware->storage 283 calls; middleware fan-in 105 / fan-out 283 owns business logic despite the name. storage is core (fan-in 560).

Rename/move packages so layers match reality; introduce explicit domain/service packages; stop new logic landing in server.go.
close_reason: Moved app layer to app/smart_contract; documented package boundaries; middleware is HTTP-only

title: Write ADRs for core architecture decisions
description:
No ADR in codebase-memory (adr_present=false). Document:
1. Single-binary deploy model
2. Storage dialect choice (SQLite primary)
3. Proposal/wish/contract lifecycle + pixel-hash identity
4. Stego/ingestion/bitcoin entanglement boundaries
5. REST vs MCP ownership

Use manage_adr / docs so agents and humans share source of truth.
close_reason: Five ADRs + index under docs/adr; linked from arch docs

title: Tame test/doc noise; add focused tests on god-handler risk
description:
626 TESTS edges but god handlers under-tested; security tests duplicated (api/security_test vs storage/security_test similar_to 1.0); docs/history pollutes call graphs (fan-in 40).

Add high-value tests on proposal/PSBT/submission flows; dedupe security tests; keep ephemeral docs in docs/history/ out of runtime imports.
close_reason: Removed duplicate storage/security_test; added PSBT helper and proposal prepare tests
